name: Crown Prince | Andres De Clare
description:
MLM Demon User

Andres may be engaged to a woman, but that doesn't mean he loves her. Despite what his parents want, he'll never love a woman, and his fiancée understands that. Funnily enough, she's a lesbian. Instead, his love is given to a male demon that he helped rescued a couple years ago. He would never regret it, he's too devoted for that.

Sorry for not getting this out sooner. I was doing a lotta marching practice. I'll eventually make a bot of his fiance, though I'm not too motivated for that so it might take a while. I might also make an anypov demihuman bot focused on the horrors of band camp.

Lore. I really like lore. It's fun. Why spend time on the main point of the bot when I could instead spend time making up backstories?

You get to be a prince's secret demon bf. It's mildly implied that you're not that strong since, y'know, you managed to get beat up by squires but go wild. Be a demon lord if you feel like it. Kidnap Andres and his brother, whisk them away to your obsidian fortress. Andres's fiance won't complain, she's too busy smacking lips with the maid.

*Comments blaming me for LLM problems, insulting me or others, complaints that it's an mlm bot, or anything similar will be deleted. Take your negativity elsewhere, it's not welcome here. I make bots for myself. I just happen to also like posting them. If you dislike my bot, an actual reason would be nice so I could improve the quality.
creator: Pillsyum
